mapper.select: select a.id, a.goods, a.userId as userid, a.admin_id as adminId, a.count, a.createtime, a.remark, a.batch_id as batchId, a.supplier_id as supplierId, coalesce(a.action_type, case when a.count < 0 then 'OUTBOUND' else 'INBOUND' end) as actionType, a.scan_code as scanCode, b.name as goodsname, c.name as storagename, d.name as goodstypename, gb.batch_no as batchNo, s.name as supplierName, (select u.name from user u where u.id = a.userId) as username, (select u.name from user u where u.id = a.admin_id) as adminname from record a left join goods b on a.goods = b.id left join storage c on b.storage = c.id left join goodsType d on b.goodsType = d.id left join goods_batch gb on a.batch_id = gb.id left join supplier s on a.supplier_id = s.id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
mapper.sql: id, goods, userId, admin_id, count, createtime, remark, batch_id, supplier_id, action_type, scan_code
